articles.title: The longer you run AI agents the more you need to: - Benchmark before you ship - Track latency, not just accuracy - Log every tool call - Replay failures - Cut context window bloat - Eval on real tasks, not toy prompts - Score outputs, not…
articles.summary: The longer you run AI agents the more you need to: - Benchmark before you ship - Track latency, not just accuracy - Log every tool call - Replay failures - Cut context window bloat - Eval on real tasks, not toy prompts - Score outputs, not vibes What would you add?
